positive: A stylized, mystical deep-sea coral reef landscape, rendered with clean silhouettes and strong bioluminescent contrast. The central focus is a complex, symmetrical formation of fantastical flora and coral, glowing with deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and neon magenta accents. The composition is highly detailed and contained, suitable for a central apparel print, featuring smooth, graphic lines and a Polynesian tattoo art influence. Studio lighting, ultra-crisp, high contrast, vector illustration quality, perfect symmetry, pop art aesthetic, isolated on a clean black background.
negative: low quality, grainy, blurry, text, watermark, signature, messy, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, human, realistic photo, ugly, monochrome, gradient, dirty, faded
